name: construction contractors processing 5–15 job site logs/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 job site logs/month, manual entry causes compliance issues that can lead to fines. We convert handwritten logs into digital compliance reports instead of manual transcription of logs into spreadsheets.
target_audience: construction contractors processing 5–15 job site logs/month
problem_solved: Manual entry of handwritten logs leads to compliance issues and potential fines.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual entry of handwritten logs leads to compliance issues and potential fines.
